results.title: Pop culture: Spurs lean on legends as Finals near
results.description: Gregg Popovich remains a trusted resource for the Spurs as they prepare for their first Finals without the legendary coach on the sideline.

results.title: Knicks mum on Robinson's status for Game 1
results.description: The Knicks declined to reveal whether Mitchell Robinson will play in Game 1 of the NBA Finals due to his broken finger, though the center participated in individual drills during practice on Tuesday.
